data.content: Implemented case-insensitive substring filtering for the Settings Agents searchable model combobox by adding a custom cmdk filter that matches against option IDs and keywords (provider/model metadata). Added unit coverage for value matches, keyword matches, no-match behavior, and clearing the search. Validation passed: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build. Branch: foolery-0f6a. Commit: 3f6e5a9f1e02.
